name: autoresearch
script_text: Autonomous AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training. This project automates the tedious task of iteratively improving language models. The agents modify the training code, run experiments, and track results - all without human intervention. Simply provide a baseline setup, and the agents will explore the search space, aiming to minimize the validation bits-per-byte metric. This hands-off approach allows for rapid, unbiased exploration, uncovering insights that may have been missed. The core idea is to program the high-level research context, not the low-level training code. A simplified version of the nanochat project serves as the testbed, but the same principles apply to any deep learning research setup. With autoresearch, the future of AI research is autonomous, efficient, and scalable.

name: goose-skills
script_text:
Goose Skills is a library of ready-to-use skills for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. It provides a collection of 125 capabilities, composites, and playbooks across key domains like ads, branding, and competitive intelligence.

The skills are designed for easy installation and cross-platform deployment. With a single command, you can install a skill to your preferred target - Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor. The Cursor integration even generates a project-local rule file for seamless integration.

This project aims to accelerate your AI-powered workflows, whether you're a sales, marketing, or competitive intelligence professional. Leverage the power of Goose Skills to boost your productivity and gain a competitive edge.

name: hermes-agent
script_text:
Hermes Agent is a self-improving AI assistant built by Nous Research. It grows with you, creating skills from experience, improving them during use, and building a deepening model of who you are across sessions. 

Hermes runs anywhere - on a $5 VPS, a GPU cluster, or serverless infrastructure. It's not tied to your laptop - talk to it from Telegram while it works on a cloud VM. Use any model you want, with no lock-in. 

Hermes has a real terminal interface with multiline editing, autocomplete, and streaming output. It lives where you do - Telegram, Discord, CLI, and more. Its closed learning loop curates memory, creates autonomous skills, and allows cross-session recall.

Hermes can also schedule unattended automations, delegate workstreams, and parallelize tasks. It's the AI agent that grows with you, empowering your productivity across platforms.

name: RCLI
script_text:
Here is a 161-word engineering-focused video script for the RCLI project:

RCLI is an on-device voice AI for macOS. It runs a complete speech-to-text, language model, text-to-speech, and visual understanding pipeline entirely on Apple Silicon — no cloud, no API keys required.

Powered by MetalRT, a proprietary GPU inference engine built specifically for Apple's chips, RCLI delivers sub-200ms end-to-end latency and 40 native macOS actions, including hands-free control of apps, document querying, and on-device vision analysis. 

The system uses a hybrid retrieval approach, quickly surfacing relevant information from your local documents to answer your voice queries. And it lets you hot-swap different language models right from the terminal, so you can find the one that best suits your needs.

RCLI brings voice AI capabilities to your Mac, with everything running locally for privacy and performance. It's an ideal tool for developers, researchers, and anyone who wants to leverage advanced language AI without relying on the cloud.

name: page-agent
script_text:
Introducing Page Agent - a revolutionary in-page JavaScript GUI agent that lets you control web interfaces with natural language. Unlike traditional browser extensions or headless browsers, Page Agent operates entirely within your web page, providing seamless text-based DOM manipulation without the need for screenshots or multi-modal language models.

With its easy integration and ability to bring your own language models, Page Agent empowers developers to ship AI-powered assistants in their products with just a few lines of code. From smart form filling to accessibility solutions, Page Agent's versatile use cases make it a game-changer for enhancing user experiences across a wide range of web applications.

Whether you're building a SaaS AI copilot or seeking to extend your web agent's reach with the optional Chrome extension and MCP server, Page Agent offers a powerful and innovative approach to natural language-driven web automation.

name: cutefolio
script_text: Build portfolios and linkfolios that are actually cute. cutefolio allows you to host your online profiles with customizable templates, custom domains, and advanced analytics. Powered by Bun, Next.js, and TypeScript, the platform offers per-profile page views, link clicks, visitor locations, and more. Integrate with Polar for seamless billing and customer management. Connect your own domain through the Vercel API. Customize fonts, colors, and layout to match your personal brand. cutefolio is the perfect tool to showcase your work, projects, or SaaS product in a visually appealing way.

name: openui
script_text:
OpenUI is a compact, streaming-first language for generative UI. Unlike traditional approaches that treat model output as text, OpenUI allows you to define components, generate prompts from that library, and render structured UI as the model streams.

The core of OpenUI is a language designed for efficient UI generation. It supports built-in components for charts, forms, tables, and more, which you can use as-is or extend. OpenUI also generates prompts directly from your component set, ensuring the model outputs match your UI requirements.

Under the hood, OpenUI uses a streaming renderer to parse and update the UI progressively as tokens arrive. This enables real-time interactions and assistants powered by large language models.

If you're building interactive applications, chatbots, or AI-driven tools, OpenUI provides a powerful foundation to generate and render UI in a more efficient, structured way.

name: dolt
script_text:
Dolt is Git for Data. It's a SQL database that you can fork, clone, branch, merge, push, and pull just like a Git repository. Connect to Dolt like any MySQL database to read or modify schema and data. All the Git commands you know work the same for Dolt, but Dolt versions tables instead of files.

We built DoltHub, a place to share Dolt databases. Host your own version with DoltLab or use our Hosted Dolt service. For Postgres fans, try Doltgres, now in beta. 

Dolt is a powerful tool with countless applications, from agent memory to multi-agent workflows. Join our Discord community to get started or check out our roadmap to see what's next.

name: kestra
script_text:
Kestra is an open-source, event-driven orchestration platform that simplifies scheduled and event-driven workflows. By leveraging Infrastructure as Code principles, Kestra enables users to declaratively define and manage complex data, process, and microservice orchestrations.

The platform's event-driven architecture allows for reactive automation, enabling workflows to respond to real-time triggers and events. Kestra's declarative configuration, based on YAML, promotes maintainability and version control of critical infrastructure.

The platform integrates with a wide range of technologies, from databases and message queues to cloud services and APIs, making it a versatile solution for mission-critical applications. Kestra's scalable and fault-tolerant design ensures reliable and resilient workflow execution, making it an ideal choice for enterprises with demanding operational requirements.

name: sql-crack
script_text:
SQL Crack is a Visual Studio Code extension that transforms SQL queries into interactive execution flow diagrams. It provides a unique visual perspective on your database operations, allowing you to understand complex queries at a glance, track data lineage, and identify optimization opportunities.

The extension supports a wide range of SQL dialects, including PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and more. It automatically generates color-coded flow diagrams, with nodes representing different query operations like filters, joins, and aggregations. You can navigate the diagram, expand nested queries, and even compare baseline and current queries side-by-side.

SQL Crack's advanced features, such as column lineage tracing and performance scoring, empower developers and analysts to gain deeper insights into their SQL workflows. This tool is a must-have for anyone working with SQL databases and looking to enhance their productivity and data understanding.

name: k8s-cleaner
script_text:
The Kubernetes controller Cleaner identifies unused or unhealthy resources, helping you maintain a streamlined and efficient Kubernetes cluster. It provides flexible scheduling, label filtering, Lua-based selection criteria, and resource removal or update capabilities. Cleaner can also automate cluster operations.

The project's unique implementation allows it to handle any Kubernetes resource types, including custom resources. Its sophisticated filtering options, including label-based selection and custom Lua-based criteria, make it a powerful tool for identifying and managing stale or orphaned resources.

Cleaner keeps you informed with notifications through popular platforms like Slack, Webex, and Discord. This ensures you stay in the loop and can take timely action to maintain a healthy Kubernetes environment.

If you're looking to optimize your Kubernetes cluster and maintain a clean, efficient infrastructure, Cleaner is the tool for you.

name: plannotator
script_text:
Plannotator is an interactive tool for annotating and reviewing coding agent plans and code diffs. It provides a visual interface to mark up plans, track changes, and share feedback with your team. Plannotator seamlessly integrates with popular AI coding agents like Claude Code, OpenCode, Pi, and Codex, allowing you to streamline your review and collaboration process.

The key features include visual plan review, automatic plan diffing, code review with inline annotations, and the ability to annotate any file or the agent's last message. Plannotator uses end-to-end encryption for secure sharing of large plans, with no server-side storage of your content.

Plannotator empowers you to streamline your AI-assisted coding workflows, enabling efficient plan refinement, code review, and team collaboration.

name: agent-browser-protocol
script_text:
Introducing agent-browser-protocol: deterministic browser automation that works seamlessly with Claude, Codex, and OpenCode. This open-source project leverages the power of the Chromium browser to enable reliable, programmatic control of web interfaces.

By utilizing a standardized protocol, agent-browser-protocol allows developers to interact with web applications in a consistent, predictable manner. Whether you're building automated testing suites, web scrapers, or integration workflows, this tool provides a robust, reliable foundation.

Designed for ease of use, agent-browser-protocol integrates effortlessly with popular AI language models, empowering users to control browser interactions through natural language commands. Unlock new possibilities in web automation and expand the capabilities of your AI-driven applications.

name: k8s-unix-system
script_text:
The k8s-unix-system project is a 3D Kubernetes resource viewer inspired by the iconic File System Navigator from Jurassic Park. It allows you to fly through your cluster like it's 1993, with namespaces rendered as raised platforms and pods as 3D blocks on each island. 

The live updates are powered by the Kubernetes watch API, providing a real-time visualization of your cluster's state. The intuitive controls and detailed resource information make it a valuable tool for monitoring and understanding your Kubernetes environments.

Whether you're a seasoned DevOps engineer or a curious developer, the k8s-unix-system project offers a unique and engaging way to explore and manage your Kubernetes resources.

name: terrapod
script_text:
Terrapod is an open-source platform that provides a drop-in replacement for Terraform Enterprise. It offers a comprehensive set of features, including remote state management, remote execution, VCS integration, and role-based access control, all while maintaining API compatibility with the HCP Terraform / TFE V2 API.

Terrapod orchestrates the execution of Terraform or Tofu as pluggable backends, allowing you to leverage your existing tooling and workflows. The platform's key features, such as private module and provider registries, binary caching, and drift detection, enhance collaboration, governance, and productivity within your infrastructure as code (IaC) operations.

Designed to be a seamless transition from Terraform Enterprise, Terrapod empowers teams to manage their cloud infrastructure with increased flexibility, security, and control, while maintaining compatibility with the tools they already use.
